description: A professional invoice layout with flex header, address blocks, metadata row, line-item table, totals, notes, and footer
visual_assertions: The SVG logo 'IP' should appear in the top-left as a blue rounded square
The 'INVOICE' title and invoice number should appear right-aligned in the top-right
The 'From' and 'Bill To' address blocks should appear side by side
The metadata row (Invoice Date, Due Date, Payment Terms) should appear in a light gray band
The line-item table should have a dark (#1e293b) header row with white uppercase text
The totals section (Subtotal, Tax, Total Due) should be right-aligned
The 'Total Due' grand total row should be larger/bolder and separated by a top border
The notes box should have a yellow/amber border and background
The footer should show centered small text with company contact information
